assertionResults.observation: Public issue #35 records PR #36 exact head 53e5c1ad067dce7ea65f054182afe855d2ccfb56, all-green run 29159266241, and merge push 29159500098 covering selected-pool blockers, zero downstream calls, recovery, and post-approval freshness races. The recorded checks directly support this assertion: Missing reserves, malformed execution fields, source partiality, and unsafe identity each prevent readiness.
